news_items.headline: Rockies’ Tovar hits two home runs, including walkoff, in 8-6 win over Giants
news_items.summary: Caleb Killian gave up two home runs in the 9th as the Rockies rallied

news_items.headline: J.P. Crawford delivers again and again as Mariners win 7-6 in extras
Wrobleski's 9 K's, Dodgers' 4 HRs vs. Wheeler overpower Phils
Phillies' Nola on paternity list; Hoffman recalled...
news_items.summary: Philadelphia Phillies starting pitcher Aaron Nola was placed on the paternity list Friday, ahead of the team's three-game set against the Los Angeles Dodgers.

news_items.headline: White Sox star Murakami (hamstring) exits early
news_items.summary: White Sox first baseman Munetaka Murakami left Friday's game against the Tigers in the third inning because of right hamstring tightness.

news_items.headline: Athletics' Severino injured, exits after one innin...
news_items.summary: Athletics right-hander Luis Severino left his start against the Yankees after one inning Friday night because of right arm soreness, the team said.

news_items.headline: Mets bump Peterson from rotation for Manaea
news_items.summary: The Mets are demoting David Peterson, an All-Star in 2025, to the bullpen and replacing him in the rotation with Sean Manaea.

news_items.headline: Mize lands on IL, further depleting Tigers' rotati...
news_items.summary: The Tigers placed starter Casey Mize on the IL with right adductor inflammation on Friday.

news_items.headline: Mariners' Raleigh takes 1st swings off tee in reha...
news_items.summary: Cal Raleigh, who was placed on the injured list May 14 with a right oblique strain, took his first swings since the Seattle Mariners catcher aggravated an injury to his right side.

news_items.headline: Dodgers make flurry of moves to reshape bench
news_items.summary: Dodgers have made a flurry of moves to remake their bench after injuries to starting outfielder Teoscar Hernández and utility man Kiké Hernández.

news_items.headline: Brewers reliever Uribe gets 1-game suspension
news_items.summary: Milwaukee reliever Abner Uribe, who is appealing a one-game suspension and an undisclosed fine for his inappropriate actions toward the St. Louis dugout earlier this week, got the win Friday night in a 10-inning win over the Astros.

news_items.headline: Carlos Rodón leads the way in an all-around victory over A’s
news_items.summary: The Yankees had no issues in the series opener in Sacramento.

news_items.summary: The Yankees have outscored the opposition 36-6 during this current winning streak.

news_items.headline: Dodgers beat Phillies as Justin Wrobleski strikes out 9 and Los Angeles hits 4 homers
news_items.summary: Justin Wrobleski took a no-hitter into the sixth inning in a 4-2 victory over the Philadelphia Phillies on Friday night.
